title: ACEF Regulation Mapping Template
description: JSON Schema for regulation mapping template files. Each template declares what evidence is required for a given regulatory profile, with machine-executable evaluation rules, date scoping, and test vector references.

template_name.description: Human-readable name of the regulation or standard.

legal_force.description: Whether the instrument is legally binding.

default_effective_date.description: Default effective date for provisions that do not specify their own (ISO 8601 date). Null if not applicable (e.g., voluntary standards).

superseded_by.description: Template ID of the successor template if this one is superseded.

applicable_system_types.description: Which system risk classifications this template applies to.

provisions.description: Provisions (articles, subcategories, clauses) defined by this regulatory framework.

test_vectors.description: Paths to test vector ACEF bundles that validate template evaluation logic.

items.description: Relative path to a test vector bundle directory or file.

provision_id.description: Unique provision identifier using dotted notation (e.g., 'article-9', 'article-9.2.a', 'govern-1.1').

normative_text_ref.description: Reference to the exact legal or standard text (e.g., 'EU AI Act Art. 9(1)-(9)').

description.description: Human-readable description of the provision's requirements.

effective_date.description: Date this provision becomes effective (ISO 8601 date). Overrides default_effective_date for this provision.

applicable_to.description: Which system types this provision applies to (subset of template's applicable_system_types).

required_evidence_types.description: Record types required by this provision. Syntactic sugar expanded into has_record_type rules by the reference validator.

minimum_evidence_count.description: Minimum number of records required per record type. Keys are record_type strings, values are integers.

evidence_freshness_max_days.description: Maximum age in days for evidence to be considered fresh.

retention_years.description: Required retention period in years for evidence under this provision.

evaluation.description: Machine-executable evaluation rules for this provision.

evaluation_scope.description: Whether this provision is evaluated per subject (default) or once for the entire package.

tiered_requirements.description: Tiered compliance requirements (e.g., GPAI Code of Practice Tier 1/2/3). Null if not applicable.

normative_text_ref.description: Reference to the exact legal text.

rule_id.description: Unique rule identifier within this template. Referenced in Assessment Bundle results.

rule.description: Rule operator name. Built-in operators: has_record_type, field_present, field_value, evidence_freshness, attachment_exists, entity_linked, exists_where, attachment_kind_exists, bundle_signed, record_attested. Vendor extensions use x-vendorname/operator_name namespace.

params.description: Operator-specific parameters. Structure depends on the rule operator.

severity.description: Importance level of this rule. 'fail' = binding requirement, 'warning' = advisory, 'info' = informational.

message.description: Human-readable explanation shown when the rule is triggered.

scope.description: Optional scope filter. If present, the rule only applies to records matching ALL criteria.

risk_classifications.description: Only evaluate against subjects with these risk classifications.

obligation_roles.description: Only evaluate against records with these obligation roles.

lifecycle_phases.description: Only evaluate against records in these lifecycle phases.

modalities.description: Only evaluate against subjects with these modalities.

condition.description: Optional condition. If present and evaluates to false, the rule is skipped (not failed, not passed).

if_provision_effective.description: If true, rule is skipped when the provision is not yet effective at evaluation_instant.

if_system_type.description: Rule applies only if the subject's risk_classification is in this list.
